title: BST Search — Multiple Queries
description: Given a sorted array representing the infix of a balanced BST, answer q queries: for each query value x, print YES if x is in the BST, NO otherwise. Use binary search.
inputSpec: First line: n and q. Second line: n sorted integers. Next q lines: a query integer.

botCodes.code:
import bisect
n,q=map(int,input().split())
a=list(map(int,input().split()))
for _ in range(q):
    x=int(input())
    i=bisect.bisect_left(a,x)
    print('YES' if i<n and a[i]==x else 'NO')

let a=Array.make 100001 0
let bs n x=let l=ref 0 and r=ref(n-1) and f=ref false in while !l <= !r&&not !f do let m=(!l + !r)/2 in if a.(m)=x then f:=true else if a.(m)<x then l:=m+1 else r:=m-1 done;!f
let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id and q=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in for i=0 to n-1 do a.(i)<-Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id done;for _=1 to q do let x=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in print_endline(if bs n x then"YES" else"NO") done
